name: SharedModelStateEnum
summary: Specifies the state of a shared model in the Tekla Structures sharing service.

enum_values.name: OFFLINE
enum_values.summary: Service is not connected, no information about what user can do is available.

enum_values.name: UNLOCKED
enum_values.summary: Service is unlocked and current model is shared. User can read in or write out depending on it the model is up-to-date.

enum_values.name: WRITELOCK
enum_values.summary: Service is reserved for writing to another user. Current user can read in but not write out.

enum_values.name: FULLLOCK
enum_values.summary: Service is reserved for investigation to another user. Current user cannot read in or write out.

enum_values.name: NEEDJOIN
enum_values.summary: Service has current packet removed. Current local model cannot be used for sharing, model need to be joined again.
